decisions.decision: TIM not ready to offer to clients
Target buyer: mid-market SOC with existing OpenCTI, can't send data to cloud
decisions.rationale: local LLM + semantic search is real differentiator for air-gap clients

decisions.decision: Reference entities queried unfiltered in briefing-generator
decisions.rationale: actors/malware/campaigns/techniques not timestamp-bumped by feed ingestion — time filter always empty

decisions.decision: MalwareBazaar and ThreatFox share same abuse.ch API key

next_action: Commit docker-compose.yml + main.py, then start briefing persistence (SQLite)
context_notes: All 5 feeds operational. ThreatFox inserted 3549 IOCs on first run. MalwareBazaar fixed (form-encoded body). Briefings no longer hallucinate — system prompt guard + unfiltered reference entity queries. Briefings.jsx generating lock fixed. Auth keys for abuse.ch feeds stored in .env (same key for both). Remaining work is improvement backlog only.
